_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v5: removed 1026 qwen3-max distillation entries (Chinese thinks + inferior action quality). GPT-5.4 re-distillation in progress for goofspiel, leduc_poker, liars_dice, hex, clobber. Bot data retained for all 7 games.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-20: v5 cleanup. 4657→3631 (-1026 qwen3-max). GPT-5.4 distillation running (~160 wins so far). HF NOT yet synced — awaiting distillation completion.

NAVWORLD.notes: D12: +230 Claude Sonnet batch2 (intercity 50, multiday 50, hybrid 50, business 50, food_tour 30). All QQR >=25. Total Claude = 341.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: REPLACING SWE-SYNTH. 345 tasks in R2 (Go ~52%, Rust ~29%, Python ~17%, Ruby ~6%). Distillation script ready. Needs Docker + API key to run.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-20: swe_distill.py built (440 lines). R2 tasks verified (1-345). Awaiting GPU machine execution.

LIVEWEB.notes: 341 clean entries after removing 14 format errors (last msg!=assistant) + 33 dupes. Plugin coverage: coingecko 309, stooq 15, taostats 4, openlibrary 4, unknown 9. prepare-data uses _normalize_tool_calls_qwen3().
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-20: quality cleanup — 388→341. Removed 14 broken (last_role=tool) + 33 duplicates. HF synced.
